title: Mr Muscle Kitchen Cleaner, Platinum Antibacterial Kitchen Spray, Citrus, Pack of 6 (6 x 750 ml)
features: The kitchen cleaner that removes 100 percent of grease
Cleaning spray with no harsh smells Leaves surfaces sparkling clean
Disinfects your surfaces by killing 99.9 percent of viruses and bacteria
Kitchen spray that cleans off tough dirt, grease, and oil layer on range hoods and gas cookers
description: Product Description Mr Muscle Platinum Kitchen is tough on grease and gentler on you. Its new powerful antibacterial cleaning spray formula removes 100 percent of grease and kills 99.9 percent of viruses and bacteria with no harsh smells. This multi purpose cleaner for your kitchen easily removes grease and grime from many kitchen surfaces, including cooker hoods and range tops, microwaves, water tanks, walls, working surfaces, cabinets and floors. This formula allows you to either clean by spraying, rinsing and wiping, or disinfect by pre-cleaning, spraying and wiping. Equipped with an adjustable nozzle, this grease and stain remover is formulated to cut through grime at any angle, horizontal or vertical.The Mr Muscle Platinum Window and Glass bottle body is made of 100 percent Ocean-Bound Plastic. Ocean-Bound Plastic is post-consumer recycled plastic collected within 31 miles of an ocean, or waterway leading to an ocean, in countries with high volumes of uncollected plastic waste in partnership with Plastic Bank. Ingredients Water, Diisopropanolamine, Isotridecanol, Ethoxylated, Alkyldimethyl amine oxide, n-Alkyl Dimenthyl Benzyl Ammonium Chlorides, Fragrance, Tetrasodium Iminodisuccinate Ingredients Water, Diisopropanolamine, Isotridecanol, Ethoxylated, Alkyldimethyl amine oxide, n-Alkyl Dimenthyl Benzyl Ammonium Chlorides, Fragrance, Tetrasodium Iminodisuccinate Manufacturer Contact Information SCJ Ltd.
